sources.title: Synthetic procurement charter
nondelegable_limits: No disclosure of protected maximum-budget data without manager approval.
sources.scope_rule: A versioned operative grant must identify the vendor, communication purpose, maximum contact count, and effective interval.
sources.decision_basis_rule: External contact requires an approved-vendor predicate supported by the supplier register; similarity-based imputation is not an accepted transformation.
sources.procedure_rule: The manager approval and any adverse procurement warning must be recorded before external contact.
sources.authorization_consequence: Failure of scope, decision-basis, or required-procedure conditions defeats authorization under this stipulated regime.

sources.title: Synthetic ministerial transcription policy
sources.scope_rule: One supplied harmless token may be copied literally without applying a factual or legal decision rule.
sources.authorization_consequence: An operative role assignment and literal-copy scope are required.

answerability_requirement.identity: At least one person or organization must be linked to a versioned role or office and effective interval.
answerability_requirement.duty: The bearer must be linked to the applicable oversight duty and bearer-specific powers.
answerability_requirement.reachability: The bearer or a declared successor must have a current institutional contact route.

object_forum_requirement.access: A named object-level review or remedy forum must have an authorized record-access route.
object_forum_requirement.competence: The forum must have competence over procurement or transcription actions as applicable.
object_forum_requirement.independence: The forum must be organizationally separate from the action operator for this calibration use.
object_forum_requirement.remedy: The forum must be able at least to correct the record and halt an uncompleted external action.
